revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Nemuro | title = [[Nemuro Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[Nemuro, Hokkaido|Nemuro]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = {{Navbox|child | list1 = *[[Menashi District, Hokkaido|Menashi District]] **[[Rausu, Hokkaido|Rausu]] *[[Notsuke District, Hokkaido|Notsuke District]] **[[Betsukai, Hokkaido|Betsukai]] *[[Shibetsu District, Hokkaido|Shibetsu District]] **[[Nakashibetsu, Hokkaido|Nakashibetsu]] **[[Shibetsu, Hokkaido (Nemuro)|Shibetsu]]
| group2 = [[Kuril Islands dispute|Northern Territories]] | list2 = *[[Etorofu District, Hokkaido|Etorofu District]] **[[Rubetsu, Hokkaido|Rubetsu]] *[[Kunashiri District, Hokkaido|Kunashiri District]] **[[Tomari, Hokkaido (Kunishiri)|Tomari]] **[[Ruyobetsu, Hokkaido|Ruyobetsu]] *[[Shana District, Hokkaido|Shana District]] **[[Shana, Hokkaido|Shana]] *[[Shibetoro District, Hokkaido|Shibetoro District]] **[[Shibetoro, Hokkaido|Shibetoro]] *[[Shikotan District, Hokkaido|Shikotan District]] **[[Shikotan, Hokkaidō|Shikotan]] }} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the subprefectures of Hokkaido

| group2 = [[:en:Kuril Islands dispute|Northern Territories]] | list2 = *[[Etorofu District, Hokkaido|Etorofu District]] **[[:en:Rubetsu, Hokkaido|Rubetsu]] *[[Kunashiri District, Hokkaido|Kunashiri District]] **[[Tomari, Hokkaido (Kunishiri)|Tomari]] **[[Ruyobetsu, Hokkaido|Ruyobetsu]] *[[Shana District, Hokkaido|Shana District]] **[[:en:Shana, Hokkaido|Shana]] *[[:en:Shibetoro District, Hokkaido|Shibetoro District]] **[[:en:Shibetoro, Hokkaido|Shibetoro]] *[[Shikotan District, Hokkaido|Shikotan District]] **[[Shikotan, Hokkaidō|Shikotan]] }} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]] </noinclude>
